name: TeddyLoid
description: {{Nihongo|'''Teddy Sakakibara'''|榊原良|Sakakibara Teddy|born August 23, 1989|lead = yes}}, known professionally as '''TeddyLoid''', is a Japanese DJ and music producer. He is known for producing several songs in the soundtrack of ''[[Panty & Stocking with Garterbelt]]'', which charted on [[Oricon Albums Chart]]. He is also known for partnering with [[Daoko]] in "ME!ME!ME!", an [[anime music video]] submitted to the 2014 [[Japan Animator Expo]].
